projects.recommendation: Prioritise data quality remediation in the top 5 source systems before pipeline build.
projects.decision: DEFERRED - Decision deferred pending completion of the feasibility study and initial risk assessment. Team to strengthen the business case and re-present at the next steering committee.

projects.recommendation: Approve the switchover date and communicate to all affected business units.
projects.decision: APPROVED - Following resolution of the Phase 1 blockers, project reinstated and approved to advance to Phase 2. All pre-conditions have been met. Budget of $380,000 confirmed.
action_items: Sara Lopez: Publish revised budget breakdown to Finance for approval - Due: 04 December 2024

projects.recommendation: Invest in automated data quality monitoring to prevent regression during scale-out.
projects.decision: APPROVED - Phase 2 deliverables reviewed and approved to continue. Progress is on track and within budget. Revised budget of $24,000 approved following scope clarification.

projects.recommendation: Proceed to Phase 3 — all Phase 2 exit criteria have been met.
projects.decision: PILOT APPROVED - Phase 3 milestones met. Pilot approved for two pilot regions (North and East). Full rollout contingent on pilot KPIs being met within 12 weeks. Budget of $95,000 released for pilot phase.
